<!-- Source of truth: the tool's Python source file(s) listed at the bottom. -->

# Rt Tools

## Overview

gSage AI — RT managerial dashboards.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `rt_dashboard` | Managerial RT dashboards: per queue/status, owner workload, stalled, SLA breaches, top requesters, mean TTR and trend | `rt:read` | — | — |
| `rt_get_ticket` | Fetch one RT ticket with optional related data | `rt:read` | — | — |
| `rt_manage` | RT write/admin operations: tickets, comments, links, merges, queues, users, bulk operations and attachment download. HITL-gated. | `rt:write` | ✓ | — |
| `rt_search` | Search RT tickets via structured filters or TicketSQL; list RT queues | `rt:read` | — | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "proxy": "",
  "timeout": 30,
  "token": "",
  "url": "",
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `proxy` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Optional proxy URL (http://user:pass@host:port). Empty string disables proxy. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | — | — | `30` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default 30). |
| `token` | `string` | — | — | `""` | RT auth token (Settings → Auth Tokens). Sensitive. |
| `url` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Base URL of the RT REST 2.0 endpoint, e.g. https://rt.example.com/REST/2.0 |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | — | — | `true` | Verify TLS certificate (default true). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_RT__PROXY` | `proxy` | `string` | `""` | — | Optional proxy URL (http://user:pass@host:port). Empty string disables proxy. |
| `TOOL_RT__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | — | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default 30). |
| `TOOL_RT__TOKEN` | `token` | `string` | `""` | — | RT auth token (Settings → Auth Tokens). Sensitive. |
| `TOOL_RT__URL` | `url` | `string` | `""` | — | Base URL of the RT REST 2.0 endpoint, e.g. https://rt.example.com/REST/2.0 |
| `TOOL_RT__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | — | Verify TLS certificate (default true). |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `rt_get_ticket`

- **`get`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `include` | `array` | — | Extra sub-resources to attach (action='get' only). Each runs in parallel. 'attachments' returns the index only — use action='fetch_attachment' to download a file. |

- **`fetch_attachment`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `attachment_id` | `integer` | — | RT attachment numeric id. Required when action='fetch_attachment'. |
  | `include` | `array` | — | Extra sub-resources to attach (action='get' only). Each runs in parallel. 'attachments' returns the index only — use action='fetch_attachment' to download a file. |

  | `queue_payload` | `object` | — | Queue create/update payload. |

  | `link_type` | `string` | — | — |
  | `target` | `—` | — | Target ticket id or URI for link operations. |
  | `op` | `string` | — | — |
  | `tickets` | `array` | — | Array of create_ticket payloads (max 25). |
  | `ticket_ids` | `array` | — | — |
  | `fields` | `object` | — | Field map for bulk_update. |
  | `queue_payload` | `object` | — | Queue create/update payload. |
  | `user_payload` | `object` | — | User create/update payload. |


## Permissions required

| Tool | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `rt_dashboard` | `rt:read` |
| `rt_get_ticket` | `rt:read` |
| `rt_manage` | `rt:write` |
| `rt_search` | `rt:read` |

| Tool | Version | Rate limit/min | Timeout (s) | Circuit breaker | Background | Multi-config |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| `rt_dashboard` | `1.0.0` | 30 | 60 | ✓ | — | — |
| `rt_get_ticket` | `1.0.0` | 60 | 45 | ✓ | — | — |
| `rt_manage` | `1.0.0` | 30 | 60 | ✓ | — | — |
| `rt_search` | `1.0.0` | 60 | 30 | ✓ | — | — |
